positive: A highly stylized and elegant depiction of a celestial creature—a winged lion guardian—emerging from a vibrant galaxy nebula. The lion should have strong, sweeping lines and a noble, powerful silhouette, rendered in deep blues, golds, and magenta gradients. It is surrounded by scattered constellations and flowing comet tails, creating dynamic movement. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, designed to look stunning as a repeating, high-contrast apparel print. Use a mix of bioluminescence, cosmic dust, and metallic gold leaf texture. Clean vector art elements combined with ethereal digital painting techniques. Minimalist but grand scale.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, writing, low quality, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, sloppy, jpeg artifacts, grain, signature, logo, trademark, copyrighted character
